scripts.postinstall: node -e "const g=require('fs').readdirSync('dist').find(f=>f.endsWith('.whl'));if(!g){console.error('No .whl found in dist/');process.exit(1)}const p=require('path').join('dist',g);require('child_process').execSync((process.platform==='win32'?'pip':'pip3')+' install --force-reinstall '+p,{stdio:'inherit'})" && node ./npm-package/bin/cli.mjs
